creator: pyrus@bsdmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael A. Oshin from comment #2)

You're right about the name of the license.

On mine, make extract made a work directory of work/pidgin-lurch-4.0.2, and make patch looks in work/pidgin-lurch-0.0.2/COPYING. One has a 4 in the version number, while the other a 0. make clean clears out the work directory.
